---
name: Design feedback
about: Propose or challenge a design decision in the current specs or plans
title: "[Design] "
labels: ["design"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What design problem, ambiguity, or risk are you pointing out?

## Relevant Documents

Link the specific files or sections involved.

## Why It Matters

Describe the operational, privacy, security, or maintenance impact.

## Proposed Change

Describe the change you want.

## Tradeoffs

What gets better, and what gets worse?

## Threat Model Impact

- [ ] No threat-model impact
- [ ] Changes privacy assumptions
- [ ] Changes trust boundaries
- [ ] Changes operational safety assumptions

Explain if any box above applies.
